name: Marcelino Guerra
abstract: Marcelino Guerra Abreu (26 April 1914 – 30 June 1996), nicknamed "Rapindey",  was a Cuban singer, songwriter and guitarist. He spent much of his life in the United States and retired in Spain.

about_quotes.speaker: Candido Camero
about_quotes.evidence: Then there is Marcelino Guerra’s Pare Cochero. ... Marcelino Guerra had his orchestra
about_quotes.doc_title: Candido Camero — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
